title: Basic design of automatic mails
excerpt: Hi, one of the most useful features is sending automatic emails. The problem is that all Israeli and Arab users cannot use this automatic email platform, because currently the only thing you can do in these emails is jus…

posts.author: Tip (Roi Tsuriely )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, one of the most useful features is sending automatic emails. The problem is that all Israeli and Arab users cannot use this automatic email platform, because currently the only thing you can do in these emails is just write from left to right. There is no way to arrange the text in even the most basic way, let alone add attachments, which is also super basic. What is strange is that you can do these simple things by sending a regular email from the system, but from the moment you want to send an email to more than one person, or the email is automatic - suddenly it stutters. Hopefully they will be able to change the situation soon and create an appropriate solution,
Roi

posts.author: Katia (Zilber)
posts.cookedHtml: I fully agree, this renders Monday email automations useless for Hebrew and Arabic. Please come up with a solution soon!
